metaData.Storage Information:
• Do not store under refrigeration
• Salt crystals may form in cold conditions

product.name: Tiparos Thai Fish Sauce

metaData.Key Information:
• Reduced Salt
• No preservatives
• No artificial colouring
• Adds a delicious salty tang to your food as a seasoning or dipping sauce
• Clear and light in colour, it is an ideal substitue for soya sauce
• Contains less salt than its regular fish sauce
